narrative:
Precinct Wash E (precinct in Scioto County) has 871 registered voters, with 59.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.6%, a modest Republican lean of 5.2 percentage points.
